name: Urolithin A frail older adult mitochondrial-quality registry study
summary: Completed randomized quadruple-masked frail-older-adult study of Mitopure urolithin A versus placebo, with mitochondrial area and cristae density as primary muscle endpoints and no posted results in the 2026-06-02 ClinicalTrials.gov API view.
population: 26 frail adults aged 65 to 85 years randomized to Mitopure urolithin A or placebo
